translations.### App 產品進入終點站，能做什麼事緬懷？\n\n: ### What can you do to commemorate when an App product reaches its end?
translations.#### [肉] 備份最後的 API Response Data\n\n: #### [Meat] Backing Up the Final API Response Data
translations.***人生也是如此，我們永遠都不知道明天是太陽先升起還是意外先來臨；唯一能做的就: ***Life is the same; we never know if the sun will rise first or if an accident will come first tomorrow. The only thing we can do is cherish the present and do things well.***
translations.***放著等他下載完成後，會跳出詢問是否要取代現有已安裝 App 視窗。***\: ***After waiting for the download to complete, a prompt will appear asking whether to replace the currently installed App.***
translations.***此時不要按任何動作。此時不要按任何動作。此時不要按任何動作。***\n\n: ***Do not press any buttons at this time. Do not press any buttons at this time. Do not press any buttons at this time.***
translations.***細節參數設定請參考該開源專案的說明。***\n\n: ***For detailed parameter settings, please refer to the documentation of the open-source project.***
translations.**2. 將 iPhone 接上 Mac 並點擊信任電腦**\n\n: **2. Connect your iPhone to your Mac and tap Trust This Computer**
translations.**3. 嗅探、了解 API 架構**\n\n: **3. Sniffing and Understanding the API Structure**
translations.**3. 確認你的手機已安裝欲備份 .ipa 檔案的 App**\n\n: **3. Confirm that your phone has the App installed for the .ipa file you want to back up**
translations.**4. 回到 Mac 上的 Apple Configurator 2**\n\: **4. Back to Apple Configurator 2 on Mac**
translations.**5. 啟用錄製，在 Terminal 下改執行：**\n\n: **5. Enable recording, then run the following in Terminal:**
translations.**6. 回到手機上操作目標 App 執行欲錄製的流程路徑**\n\n: **6. Return to the phone and operate the target App to perform the process path you want to record**
translations.**在手機上打開 Safari 輸入： <http://mitm.it/>{:t: **Open Safari on your phone and enter: <http://mitm.it/>{:target="_blank"}**
translations.**如果回傳的資料包含個資，請記得調整擷取內容去識別化。**\n: **If the returned data contains personal information, please remember to adjust the captured content to anonymize it.**
translations.**如果您的 App & API Server 有實作 SSL Pinning: **If your App & API Server implement SSL Pinning, you also need to add the pinning certificate to mitmproxy.**
translations.*本文僅為技術研究分享，不鼓勵利用任何技術進行非法、侵權行為。*\n\n: *This article is for technical research sharing only and does not encourage any illegal or infringing activities.*
translations.*此時只有 HTTP 流量能被嗅探，HTTPS 流量會報錯，我們繼續往下設定。*: *At this point, only HTTP traffic can be sniffed; HTTPS traffic will cause errors. We will continue with the setup.*
translations.*要記得當前你手機所有的流量都會經過代理從你的 Mac 電腦出去， **操作完畢: *Remember that all the traffic from your phone will go through the proxy on your Mac. **After finishing, make sure to turn off the proxy server setting in your phone’s network settings**, otherwise the phone's WiFi will not connect to the internet.*
translations.*針對 HTTPS 加密連線我們需要使用根憑證抽換進行中間人攻擊，因此第一次使用: *For HTTPS encrypted connections, we need to use root certificate replacement to perform a man-in-the-middle attack. Therefore, the first time you use it, you must download and enable the root certificate on the mobile device.*
translations.- Check the Mac's IP address in the Mac: - Check the Mac's IP address in the Mac Network Settings
translations.- Click to enter, tap \"Install\" at the: - Click to enter, tap "Install" at the top right, and enter your phone password to complete the installation.
translations.- Enter the Mac computer's IP address on:
- Enter the Mac computer's IP address on the server

- Enter port 8080

- Save
translations.- First, ensure that the iPhone and Mac:
- First, ensure that the iPhone and Mac are connected to the same network environment.

- If there is no WiFi and the computer is connected to a physical network, you can also [enable Mac's WiFi sharing feature](https://applealmond.com/posts/92291){:target="_blank"} to let your phone connect to the Mac's network.
translations.- It is recommended to restart and reins:
- It is recommended to restart and reinstall the App to begin with the cleanest setup.

- It is recommended to record the screen to help recall the reproduction steps.
translations.- Re-recording can be done by simply del:
- Re-recording can be done by simply deleting the output directory to allow re-capturing.

- **If the returned data contains personal information, please make sure to anonymize the captured content.**
translations.- The \"bones\" disappear as the App is:
- The "bones" disappear when the App is removed from the App Store.

- The "meat" disappears as the API host and servers shut down.
translations.- The ending `\"~d zhgchg.li\"` means to:
- The ending `"~d zhgchg.li"` means to only capture traffic for *.zhgchg.li.

- `dumper_folder` : Output destination directory name
translations.- The recorded captured path pages can b:
- The recorded captured path pages can be replayed and displayed again: OK!

- Recording captures paths not previously visited, playback shows network error: OK!
translations.- `dumper_folder` : Output destination d:
- `dumper_folder` : Output destination directory name

- By default, local Response Data without Hash Mapping will return a 404, leaving the App blank. This helps verify if the captured data is valid.
translations.1. Open the QuickTime Player app on your: 1. Open the QuickTime Player app on your Mac
translations.2. 左上角工具列選擇「檔案」-&gt;「新增影片錄製」\n\n: 2. In the top-left toolbar, select "File" -> "New Movie Recording"
translations.3. 跳出錄影介面後點擊 🔴 旁的「v」，螢幕與揚聲器選擇您接上的手機\n\n: 3. After exiting the recording interface, click the "v" next to the 🔴, then select your connected iPhone for both screen and speaker.
translations.4. 此時錄影介面就會出現手機畫面\n\n: 4. At this point, the recording interface will display the phone screen.

translations.> ***Do not press any buttons at this ti: > ***Do not press any buttons at this time. Do not press any buttons at this time. Do not press any buttons at this time.***
translations.> ***For detailed parameter settings, pl: > ***For detailed parameter settings, please refer to the documentation of the open-source project.***
translations.> ***Life is the same; we never know if: > ***Life is the same; we never know if the sun will rise first or if an accident will come first tomorrow. The only thing we can do is cherish the present and do things well.***
translations.> **If your App & API Server implement S: > **If your App & API Server implement SSL Pinning, you also need to add the pinning certificate to mitmproxy.**
translations.> *At this point, only HTTP traffic can: > *At this point, only HTTP traffic can be sniffed; HTTPS traffic will cause errors. We will continue with the setup.*
translations.> *For HTTPS encrypted connections, we n: > *For HTTPS encrypted connections, we need to use root certificate replacement to perform a man-in-the-middle attack. Therefore, the first time you use it, you must download and enable the root certificate on the mobile device.*
translations.> *Remember that all the traffic from yo: > *Remember that all the traffic from your phone will go through the proxy on your Mac. **After finishing, make sure to turn off the proxy server setting in your phone’s network settings**, otherwise the phone's WiFi will not connect to the internet.*
translations.> *This article is for technical researc: > *This article is for technical research sharing only and does not encourage any illegal or infringing activities.*
translations.> [*My implementation principle*](../5a5: > [*My implementation principle*](../5a5c4b25a83d/) *is to hash the request parameters, and during playback, hash the request again. If a matching hash is found locally, the backup response is returned. If multiple requests have the same hash, they are stored and played back in order.*
translations.App 在商城下架後已下載 App 的手機只要不主動刪除 App，就會一直存在在: After an app is removed from the store, it will remain on any device that has already downloaded it, as long as the user does not delete it. When switching phones, the app will also be transferred through the device migration process.
translations.App 技術備份可分為兩個方向；「骨」App 本身其實只是個骨架、「肉」由 AP: App technical backup can be divided into two directions: the "bones," which is the App itself as a framework, and the "flesh," composed of API Response Data, which forms the core content of the App.
translations.[*我的實現原理*](../5a5c4b25a83d/) *是將 Request: [*My implementation principle*](../5a5c4b25a83d/) *is to hash the request parameters, and during playback, hash the request again. If a matching hash is found locally, the backup response is returned. If multiple requests have the same hash, they are stored and played back in order.*
translations.```bash\nmitmdump -s rodo.py --set dumpe:
```bash
mitmdump -s rodo.py --set dumper_folder=zhgchgli --set config_file=config.json --set record=true "~d zhgchg.li"
```
translations.mitmproxy 是一套開源的中間人攻擊，網路請求嗅探工具。\n\n: mitmproxy is an open-source man-in-the-middle attack and network request sniffing tool.
translations.一樣是將欲還原 App 的手機接上 Mac 並打開 Apple Configur: Similarly, connect the iPhone with the App to be restored to the Mac and open Apple Configurator 2, then go to the Add Apps interface.
translations.下載完成後進入到手機的設定，會出現「已下載描述檔」點擊進入。\n\n: After downloading, go to the phone's Settings, where you will see "Profile Downloaded." Tap to enter.
translations.代表手機的網路代理伺服器沒有設定成功或是 Mac 上沒啟動 `mitmproxy: This indicates that the phone's network proxy server is not set up correctly or that `mitmproxy` is not running on the Mac.
translations.代表連接成功，我們找到 iOS 區塊點擊「Get mimproxy-ca-cer: Indicates a successful connection. We locate the iOS section and click "Get mitmproxy-ca-cert.pem".
translations.以上參數在計算 Hash 值時都會被排除，也能針對個別 Endpoint 路徑設: These parameters are excluded when calculating the Hash value, and specific exclusion rules can be set for individual Endpoint paths.
translations.以上是 mitmproxy 基礎設定與實際工作。\n\n: The above covers the basic setup and actual operation of mitmproxy.
translations.以此篇文章紀念第一份工作的團隊與當年從網頁後端開發邊做邊學轉職 iOS App: This article is dedicated to the team of my first job and my journey of transitioning from web backend development to iOS App development through learning on the job. Within a short 3–4 months, I independently built the product from scratch and successfully launched it together with Android developers, designers, PMs, managers, and backend colleagues. Although the product is now approaching the end of its life cycle, I will always remember the bittersweet experiences and the excitement of seeing it go live and being used for the first time.
translations.伺服器輸入 Mac 電腦的 IP 位址\n: Enter the Mac computer's IP address on the server
translations.但如果我們不小心刪除該 App 或是換手機沒轉移，那就真的永遠跟他說再見了；此時: But if we accidentally delete the App or switch phones without transferring it, then it’s really goodbye forever; at this point, having a manual backup of the store’s .ipa file allows you to revive it again.
translations.使用 mitmproxy + apple configurator 讓 App: Using mitmproxy + Apple Configurator to Keep an App Forever in Its Pre-Removal State
translations.使用我寫好的錄製、回放開源 Script。\n\n: Use the open-source recording and playback script I wrote.
translations.再來就要透過 mitmproxy 的 `mitmdump` 服務結合我之前開發的: Next, use mitmproxy's `mitmdump` service combined with my previously developed [**mitmproxy-rodo**](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/mitmproxy-rodo/tree/main){:target="_blank"} [addons](https://docs.mitmproxy.org/stable/addons-overview/){:target="_blank"} to record and replay requests.
translations.凡走過必留下痕跡，我們希望能在產品進入終點站之前做些什麼，讓大家還有機會回憶也讓: Wherever we go, traces are left behind. We hope to do something before the product reaches its end, giving everyone a chance to remember and at least leaving proof that it existed. The following methods all require the app to still be online; if it has already been removed, only memories remain.
translations.切換到「App」-> 右上角「+ 加入」->「App」\n\n: Switch to "Apps" -> Top right corner "+ Add" -> "App"
translations.到 Mac 網路設定查看 Mac 的 IP 位址\n: Check the Mac's IP address in the Mac Network Settings
translations.可以透過 QuickTime Player 工具列簡單的裁剪影片，最後按下「Co: You can easily trim the video using the QuickTime Player toolbar, then press "Command" + "s" to export and save the video to a chosen location, completing the recording for remembrance.
translations.同之前用錄製 API Request & Response 來跑 E2E Tes: Similar to the previous technique of recording API Request & Response for E2E Testing, we can also use it to capture the final API Request & Response Data before an App is taken down or shut off.
translations.回到 Terminal mitmproxy，一邊操做手機上的 App 就能看到所: Back in the Terminal mitmproxy, you can see all the captured API request logs while operating the App on your phone.
translations.回到手機 WiFi 設定點擊「i」進入詳細設定，找到最下方「設定代理伺服器」：\: Go back to the phone's WiFi settings and tap the "i" to enter detailed settings. Find the "Configure Proxy" option at the bottom:
translations.回到設定 -> 「一般」->「關於本機」-> 最下方「憑證信任設定」-> 啟用「: Go to Settings -> "General" -> "About" -> Scroll down to "Certificate Trust Settings" -> Enable "mitmproxy".
translations.因此我們也分成備份骨跟肉兩個技術方式。\n\n: Therefore, we also divide the backup into two technical methods: the skeleton and the flesh.
translations.在 Mac 上打開 QuickTime Player App\n: Open the QuickTime Player app on your Mac
translations.在 Terminal 啟動 `mitmproxy` or `mitmweb` (: Start `mitmproxy` or `mitmweb` (Web GUI version) in the Terminal.
translations.如果你不熟悉 Mitmproxy 中間人攻擊的工作原理可先參考我之前的文章：「: If you are not familiar with how Mitmproxy man-in-the-middle works, you can first refer to my previous article: "[APP有用HTTPS傳輸，但資料還是被偷了。](../46410aaada00/)" or the [Mitmproxy official documentation](https://docs.mitmproxy.org/stable/overview-getting-started/){:target="_blank"}.
translations.如果你也有相同的遺憾，希望本篇文章也能幫助到你，因為 [mitmproxy-ro: If you share the same regret, I hope this article can help you. The tool [mitmproxy-rodo](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/mitmproxy-rodo/tree/main){:target="_blank"} was initially developed as a proof-of-concept. Contributions, bug reports, or PRs to fix bugs are welcome.
translations.如果是用在純網路請求嗅探，用不習慣 mimproxy 介面也可以改用「 [Pro: For pure network request sniffing, if you find the mitmproxy interface uncomfortable, you can switch to using [Proxyman](https://proxyman.io/){:target="_blank"}. Refer to the usage in the previous [article](../70a1409b149a/).
translations.完成 App Store 帳號登入後可以取得您曾經購買過的 App 列表。\n\: After signing in to your App Store account, you can access the list of apps you have previously purchased.
translations.完成檔案複製後再回去 Apple Configurator 2 點擊停止，終止操: After completing the file copy, go back to Apple Configurator 2 and click Stop to terminate the operation.
translations.將上一步驟 3. 挑出來的參數填入到 config.json 設定檔案中：\n\: Fill the parameters selected in step 3 into the config.json configuration file:
translations.將其複製出來即可完成 App .ipa 檔案備份。\n\n: Simply copying it completes the backup of the App .ipa file.
translations.就可以找到下載下來正準備要安裝的目標 App .ipa 檔案：\n\n: You can find the target App .ipa file that is downloaded and ready to be installed:
translations.工作時間久、經手過的產品多，也開始遇到有曾經參與過的產品要進入終點站(下架)；從: After working for a long time and handling many products, I’ve started to face products I once worked on reaching their end point (discontinuation). Developing a product from scratch is like nurturing a new life; the team worked hard for 3–4 months to bring it to life. Although later it was handed over to other caretakers (engineers) for continued development, hearing that it’s about to reach the end of its product life cycle still brings some regret.
translations.左上角工具列選擇「前往」-> 「前往檔案夾」\n\n: In the top-left toolbar, select "Go" -> "Go to Folder"
translations.建議可以搭配錄影，以利記得復現步驟\n: It is recommended to record the screen to help remember the reproduction steps.
translations.建議重啟、重安裝 App 用最乾淨的方式開始操作\n: It is recommended to restart and reinstall the App to start with the cleanest setup.
translations.影片留念的好處是未來回憶比圖片更容易串連起來，錄的越深就紀錄的越仔細，若要將更別: The advantage of video keepsakes is that they make it easier to connect memories than pictures. The deeper you record, the more detailed the documentation. If you want to turn specific scenes into images, you can simply take screenshots, which is very convenient.
translations.很久以前 [逆向工程的文章](../7498e1ff93ce/) 有提到過，但這: A long time ago, the [reverse engineering article](../7498e1ff93ce/) mentioned this, but this time we only need to simply back up the .ipa file without cracking it, all done using Apple’s official tools.
translations.我們可以先透過以上方法嗅探 App 的 API (或使用 [Proxyman](: We can first sniff the App's API using the methods above (or use [Proxyman](https://proxyman.io/){:target="_blank"}) to observe which fields may affect Hash Mapping. These can be recorded and excluded in later settings. **For example, some APIs always include a `?ts` parameter that doesn't affect the response content but changes the Hash calculation, causing the local backup to be missed. We need to identify and exclude such parameters in later configurations.**
translations.我們需要在 Apple Configurator 2 卡出取代畫面，才能取得下載: We need to capture the replacement screen in Apple Configurator 2 to obtain the .ipa file downloaded to the cache. Therefore, we must first ensure the target app is installed on the iPhone.
translations.接上成功後就會出現 iPhone 的主畫面。\n\n: After a successful connection, the iPhone home screen will appear.
translations.搜尋找到欲備份的目標 App，選擇後點「加入」。\n\n: Search for the target App you want to back up, then select it and click "Add".
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.正常情況會出現：\n\n: Under normal circumstances, the following will appear:
translations.此時會出現等待視窗，正在 XXX 上加入 App、正在下載「XXX」。\n\n: A waiting window will appear, showing "Adding App on XXX" and "Downloading 'XXX'."
translations.每個請求都能進入查看詳細 Request & Response 內容：\n\n: Each request allows you to view detailed Request & Response content:
translations.看到這畫面代表 mitmproxy 服務已啟動，目前沒有流量進來所以是空的，掛在: Seeing this screen means the mitmproxy service has started. There is no traffic yet, so it is empty. Keep this Terminal window open and do not close it.
translations.等待傳送、安裝完成，回到手機上就能重新打開 App，復活成功！\n\n: Wait for the transfer and installation to complete. Then, you can reopen the App on your phone—successfully revived!
translations.結尾的 `\"~d zhgchg.li\"` 意思是只截取 *.zhgchg.l: The ending `"~d zhgchg.li"` means to only capture traffic for *.zhgchg.li.
translations.肉會隨著 API 主機、伺服器關閉而消失。\n: The "meat" will disappear as the API host and servers shut down.
translations.至此我們就完成中間人攻擊所有的前置準備工作。\n\n: At this point, we have completed all the preparatory work for the man-in-the-middle attack.
translations.至此，我們已經可以自行透過還原骨與最後的肉，來復現當年 App 走進終點站前的最: By now, we can restore the "bones" and the final "flesh" ourselves to recreate the last moments of the App before it reached its end, cherishing the time when everyone worked together to create it.
translations.若無 WiFi 電腦連接實體網路，也可以 [打開 Mac 的 WiFi 分享功能: If there is no WiFi and the computer is connected to a physical network, you can also [enable Mac's WiFi sharing feature](https://applealmond.com/posts/92291){:target="_blank"} to let your phone connect to the Mac's network.
translations.這邊會運用到之前在 [**App End-to-End Testing Loca: Here we will use the method and the open-source project from the previous article [**App End-to-End Testing Local Snapshot API Mock Server**](../5a5c4b25a83d/) **(refer to it for detailed principles)**:
translations.選擇備份的 App .ipa 檔案，按「加入」。\n\n: Select the App .ipa file to back up, then click "Add".
translations.還原的話要選擇左下角「從我的 Mac 選擇…」\n\n: To restore, select "Choose from my Mac..." at the bottom left.
translations.邊操作的同時，就能看到輸出目錄會有很多擷取下來的 API Response Da: While operating, you can see the output directory contains many captured API Response Data, stored following Domain -> API Path -> HTTP Method -> Hash Value -> Header-X / Content-X (if the same Hash request occurs twice, they will be saved in order).
translations.重新錄製可以直接刪出輸出目錄，讓他重新擷取。\n: Re-recording can be done by simply deleting the output directory to let it re-capture.
translations.錄影中會顯示當前影片大小，欲結束錄影再按一次「🔴」即可停止。\n\n: During recording, the current video size will be displayed. To stop recording, press the "🔴" button again.
translations.錄製完畢後請務必要嘗試回放一次，測試資料是否正常，若 Hash Hit 很低(回: After recording, be sure to try playback once to test if the data is correct. If the Hash Hit is very low (almost no matching Response found during playback), you can repeat the sniffing process to find the variable that changes each time the App runs and affects the Hash value, then exclude it.
translations.錄製擷取時有經過過的路徑頁面，回放時能重新顯示：OK!\n: The recorded captured path pages can be replayed and displayed again: OK!
translations.錄製擷取時沒經過過的路徑頁面，回放時顯示網路錯誤：OK!\n: Recording captures paths not previously visited, playback shows network error: OK!
translations.除了直接用 [iPhone 內建的螢幕錄影功能](https://support: Besides using the [iPhone's built-in screen recording feature](https://support.apple.com/zh-tw/102653){:target="_blank"} directly, we can also connect the iPhone to a Mac and use QuickTime Player to record and export the video on the computer.
translations.預設本地沒有 Hash Mapping 到的 Response Data 會直接: By default, local Response Data without Hash Mapping will return a 404, leaving the App blank. This helps verify if the captured data is valid.
translations.首先去 Mac App Store 下載安裝「 [Apple Configura: First, go to the Mac App Store to download and install [Apple Configurator 2](https://apps.apple.com/tw/app/apple-configurator/id1037126344?mt=12){:target="_blank"}
translations.首先確保 iPhone 手機與 Mac 電腦是連接在相同的網路環境\n: First, ensure that the iPhone and Mac are connected to the same network environment.
translations.骨會隨著 App 從 App Store 商城下架而消失。\n: The "bones" disappear as the App is removed from the App Store.
translations.點兩下上面顯示的 iPhone 主畫面進入資訊頁。\n\n: Double-click the iPhone home screen shown above to enter the information page.
translations.點擊「🔴」開始錄影，回到手機上操作要錄影的內容。\n\n: Click the "🔴" to start recording, then return to your phone to perform the actions you want to record.
translations.點擊進入，右上角「安裝」，輸入手機密碼完成安裝。\n: Click to enter, tap "Install" at the top right, and enter your phone password to complete the installation.
